overall.description: First-person perspective walk through a rainy cyberpunk city waterfront at night. The player moves along a wet concrete promenade past seated NPCs, passes under a highway overpass, walks through a neon-lit corridor with massive digital billboards, and emerges onto an open palm-lined boardwalk with a distant bridge visible.

events.description: pedestrian with umbrella passes in front of camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade past seated pedestrians on concrete benches

notable_agents.action: seated on bench wearing white hooded outfit, looking down
seated on bench in dark clothing, looking at device

entered.detail: vertical cylindrical fixture emitting warm yellow light, mounted on black pole
long rectangular concrete seating with integrated planters containing small trees
metal safety railing separating walkway from dark water below
elevated highway structure with vehicles visible traveling above
tall structure with illuminated signage displaying '05' and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night along a wet concrete waterfront promenade. The camera walks past several NPCs seated on modern concrete benches, passing a tall yellow light pole on the left. In the distance, a highway overpass and illuminated digital tower are visible through the rain.

events.description: entering covered area beneath the highway overpass, lighting dims significantly
approaching corridor entrance with visible pink neon glow ahead

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass toward the illuminated corridor entrance

notable_agents.action: person in light blue jacket walking ahead toward the corridor

entered.detail: massive cylindrical columns supporting the highway structure overhead
dark automated kiosk with illuminated interface screen

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a darker, enclosed space beneath the highway overpass, supported by massive concrete pillars. The environment becomes more sheltered from the rain. Ahead, the pink glow of digital billboards marks the entrance to a covered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with digital advertising walls

events.description: entering enclosed corridor with large illuminated digital billboards on both sides
continuing through corridor as pedestrians with umbrellas pass by

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit corridor surrounded by glowing advertisements and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman with black umbrella and dark suit walking toward camera
man in yellow shirt standing near the advertisement wall looking at display

entered.detail: large illuminated screen displaying vehicle advertisements with cyan and white lighting
pink-magenta illuminated wall with multiple digital posters and neon text reading 'GOT CHROME?'
dark metal beam structure forming the roof of the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow corridor completely enclosed by massive digital billboards. The left wall displays cyan-tinted vehicle ads while the right wall glows with intense pink neon advertisements. Several pedestrians with umbrellas walk through the space, creating a dense cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront boardwalk with palm tree landscaping

events.description: exiting covered corridor back to open waterfront promenade with palm trees visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront boardwalk with palm trees and city skyline visible ahead

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway along the water edge with wet reflective surface
tall palm trees lining the promenade path, silhouetted against the night sky
large illuminated bridge structure spanning across the water in the distance
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows forming the city backdrop

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the corridor into an open waterfront area with a wooden boardwalk on the right. Tall palm trees line the path while the city skyline rises on the left. In the distance, a large suspension bridge spans the water, completing the cyberpunk cityscape view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rainy, open waterfront promenade into a neon-saturated corridor before emerging onto a palm-lined boardwalk. It begins by walking past NPCs on concrete benches under a yellow light pole, moving through the rain toward a distant highway overpass and illuminated tower. As the camera passes beneath the massive concrete pillars of the overpass, the environment becomes sheltered and the lighting shifts toward a pink glow. The scene then transitions into a narrow corridor enclosed by towering digital billboards, where cyan vehicle ads and intense pink neon clash amidst a crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosure onto a wooden boardwalk lined with tall palm trees, opening up to a view of the city skyline and a distant suspension bridge spanning the water.
